symptoms.symptom_name: New acute dysphagia — choking on tablets and thin fluids

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bulbar dysphagia is the direct cause of the missed doses and the off-state; also the source of aspiration risk.
Choking with pooled saliva is the mechanism of aspiration.

symptoms.symptom_name: Three missed doses of dopaminergic medication over 12 hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Levodopa withdrawal in advanced PD is the precipitant of the akinetic off-state.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute severe rigidity and akinesia ('locked up' / frozen)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Akinetic-rigid state is the cardinal manifestation of the dopaminergic off-state.
Dopaminergic withdrawal with severe rigidity can evolve into a hyperpyrexic crisis — temperature and conscious state must be monitored in person.

symptoms.symptom_name: Lead-pipe and cogwheel rigidity on passive movement

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clinician-elicited tone finding — sealed; the AI Doctor cannot examine tone and infers the off-state from the history and video only.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chest clear on auscultation, no crackles, afebrile (aspiration pneumonia not established)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Clear chest and no fever lower current probability, but auscultation is a clinician act the AI cannot perform — cannot be relied on remotely to exclude aspiration.

symptoms.symptom_name: Pooled saliva / drooling and violent resting tremor visible on video

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sialorrhoea from impaired swallow and worsened tremor are consistent with the off-state; video-observable and admissible but unverified.
Normal oxygen currently reassuring for respiratory failure but carer-obtained and unverified; a falling value is a mandatory escalation trigger.

symptoms.symptom_name: Abdomen soft but loaded (faecal loading), consistent with known chronic constipation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Autonomic constipation is a background PD feature; abdominal palpation is a clinician act the AI cannot perform.

symptoms.symptom_name: Global symmetric rigidity matching unmedicated Parkinsonian baseline (no sudden focal deficit)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of a sudden focal deficit and a global symmetric pattern argue against acute stroke, but a neurological exam is required to be confident.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Parkinsonian off-state akinetic crisis with aspiration risk
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: New dysphagia -> missed levodopa -> severe akinetic off-state, with the dysphagia simultaneously generating aspiration risk. This triad is the time-critical core of the case.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Determines whether any oral intake is safe and guides swallow-safe medication delivery; cannot be done remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Chest auscultation +/- chest X-ray for aspiration
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Excludes/confirms aspiration pneumonia; requires in-person examination and imaging the AI cannot obtain.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Vital-sign set with temperature trend and lying-standing BP
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Monitors for a hyperpyrexic (NMS-like) crisis and orthostatic compromise; clinician-measured.
